input: Set up a new Node.js project from scratch with TypeScript, Express, ESLint, Prettier, and Jest. Include a basic 'hello world' GET endpoint and a passing test for it.
I have a Node.js application that's leaking memory in production. It restarts every few hours when it hits the memory limit. Walk me through how you'd identify the cause and fix it.
Add authentication to this Express app using JWT. Users should be able to register, log in, and access a protected /me endpoint that returns their profile. Use bcrypt for password hashing.
This Python project uses an old version of pandas (0.25) and I want to upgrade to 2.x. Plan and execute the migration, fixing any breaking changes you encounter.
Set up a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions for a Node.js project. It should run linting, tests, and a build on every push and PR. On merge to main, it should deploy to a staging environment.

Refactor this monolithic Express app to extract the user management logic into a separate module with clean boundaries. The current code mixes routing, business logic, and database queries in single files.
Convert this CommonJS Node.js project to ESM. Update all the imports/exports, fix the package.json, and make sure the existing tests still pass.
